company_summary: 拓普集团(601689.SH) is an automotive parts manufacturer with eight product lines: NVH dampening, interior/exterior trim, lightweight body, smart cockpit, thermal management, chassis, air suspension, and intelligent driving. It also has a robot actuator division for embodied intelligence. In FY2025, revenue was 29.58B CNY and net profit 2.78B CNY. In Q1 2026, revenue was 6.63B CNY, gross margin 19.26%, net margin 8.33%. Market cap as of 2026-06-29 is 91.0B CNY, PE TTM 32.9.

segments.products_or_services: 汽车NVH减震系统、内外饰系统、轻量化车身、智能座舱部件、热管理系统、底盘系统、空气悬架系统、智能驾驶系统
segments.causal_chain: Automotive OEM demand -> capacity utilization in China (and overseas plants in Poland/Thailand) -> price/mix from contract awards and annual price reductions -> margin from volume, mix, and cost absorption -> cash flow from working capital management.
segments.evidence_quote: / Gross margin / 19.2562% / -0.64pp / YoY: 20260331 vs 20250331 / main bridge from demand to gross profit /

segments.products_or_services: 机器人执行器及相关智能硬件
segments.business_model: 研发与制造，新业务孵化
segments.causal_chain: Robot industry demand -> technology readiness -> customer nomination -> capacity build -> revenue (minimal) -> margin (negative initially)
segments.evidence_quote: 成立机器人执行器事业部切入具身智能业务是公司的一个重要战略举措。

/ 2026-04-29 / 2026-06-24 / 汽车零部件业务承压，机器人业务蹭特斯拉概念，几乎没有业绩？公司还有像样的业务？不谈未来预期，还有增长点吗？ / 尊敬的投资者您好，公司生产经营整体稳健，2025 年实现营业收入 295.81 亿元，同比稳步增长，主营汽车底盘、热管理、内饰等传统业务依托国内外优质车企定点订单持续贡献稳定营收与利润，是公司扎实的基本盘。2025 年相关营收在年报中已披露；除原有汽车主业外，新兴业务如车规级制氧新业务有序落地推进，后续将逐步形成新增业绩增长点，详细经营数据与业务进展
